description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design, featuring large, cushioned ear cups and a curved, padded headband. The ear cups are predominantly black with subtle gold or brass accent rings, giving the headphones a premium appearance. The headband appears to be reinforced with a metallic or plastic core, covered in a dark material for comfort and durability. The ear pads are thick and likely made of soft foam covered in synthetic leather or similar material, designed to provide noise isolation and comfort during extended use. The headphones do not display any visible branding or control buttons, suggesting a minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a focus on both style and ergonomic fit, suitable for personal audio use in urban environments.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear headphones with black cushioned ear cups and gold accent rings, connected by a padded, curved headband. The design is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing comfort and style.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both large, black ear cups and the curved headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular ear cup with a gold accent ring and the headband's attachment.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, showing the back of the ear cups and the headband arch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again focusing on the ear cup's circular design and gold accent.
